ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure-Samples/AI-Gateway
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure-Samples/AI-Gateway
Language: jupyter-notebook
Labs to explore AI Models, MCP servers, and Agents with the AI Gateway powered by Azure API Management and Microsoft Foundry 🚀

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GoogleCloudPlatform/training-data-analyst
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/training-data-analyst
Language: jupyter-notebook
Labs and demos for courses for GCP Training (http://cloud.google.com/training).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA-NeMo/Nemotron
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Nemotron
Language: jupyter-notebook
Developer Asset Hub for NVIDIA Nemotron — A one-stop resource for training recipes, usage cookbooks, datasets, and full end-to-end reference examples to build with Nemotron models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/GenerativeAIExamples
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/GenerativeAIExamples
Language: jupyter-notebook
Generative AI reference workflows optimized for accelerated infrastructure and microservice architecture.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NirDiamant/RAG_Techniques
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NirDiamant/RAG_Techniques
Language: jupyter-notebook
This repository showcases various advanced techniques for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. Each technique has a detailed notebook tutorial.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NirDiamant/agents-towards-production
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NirDiamant/agents-towards-production
Language: jupyter-notebook
End-to-end, code-first tutorials for building production-grade GenAI agents. From prototype to enterprise deployment.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Pierian-Data/Complete-Python-3-Bootcamp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Pierian-Data/Complete-Python-3-Bootcamp
Language: jupyter-notebook
Course Files for Complete Python 3 Bootcamp Course on Udemy

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PolymathicAI/the_well
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PolymathicAI/the_well
Language: jupyter-notebook
A 15TB Collection of Physics Simulation Datasets

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Snowflake-Labs/sfquickstarts
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Snowflake-Labs/sfquickstarts
Language: jupyter-notebook
Follow along with our tutorials to get you up and running with Snowflake.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ageron/handson-ml3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ageron/handson-ml3
Language: jupyter-notebook
A series of Jupyter notebooks that walk you through the fundamentals of Machine Learning and Deep Learning in Python using Scikit-Learn, Keras and TensorFlow 2.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ed-donner/agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ed-donner/agents
Language: jupyter-notebook
Repo for the Complete Agentic AI Engineering Course

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jakevdp/PythonDataScienceHandbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jakevdp/PythonDataScienceHandbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
Python Data Science Handbook: full text in Jupyter Notebooks

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/iq-series
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/iq-series
Language: jupyter-notebook
The IQ Series is a hands-on learning experience for Microsoft IQ: Microsoft's unified intelligence layer for the enterprise, spanning Foundry IQ, Work IQ, and Fabric IQ. The series includes video episodes, Jupyter notebooks, and Azure deployment templates.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai/openai-cookbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai/openai-cookbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
Examples and guides for using the OpenAI API

ns0:entry.ns0:title: oracle-devrel/oracle-ai-developer-hub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/oracle-devrel/oracle-ai-developer-hub
Language: jupyter-notebook
Technical resources for AI developers to build applications, agents, and systems using Oracle AI Database and OCI services

ns0:entry.ns0:title: patchy631/ai-engineering-hub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/patchy631/ai-engineering-hub
Language: jupyter-notebook
In-depth tutorials on LLMs, RAGs and real-world AI agent applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pyannote/pyannote-audio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pyannote/pyannote-audio
Language: jupyter-notebook
Neural building blocks for speaker diarization: speech activity detection, speaker change detection, overlapped speech detection, speaker embedding

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zju3dv/GVHMR
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zju3dv/GVHMR
Language: jupyter-notebook
Code for "GVHMR: World-Grounded Human Motion Recovery via Gravity-View Coordinates", Siggraph Asia 2024
